description: User reviews the trip details and price summary on the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The user is looking at the flight details and the total price summary on the right side of the screen.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' and 'Seats' sections.
User moves the cursor over the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
User clicks the 'SELECT SEATS' button to open the seat selection interface.
The 'Select Seats' modal overlay appears with a 'Loading seat selector' message and spinner.
